reviews.review_text:
Jo & I have stayed at Main Beach Tourist Park in our Caravan on several holidays & we just love everything about this park & the location.
The wonderful managers Nicky & Al & all the staff who run this park to a high standard. It is always 💯 beautifully clean & tidy hence why we keep coming back. Also it has a wonderful vibe & the managers & staff are always so happy, abliging & go the extra mile.
We always have an amazing relaxed holiday.
Thankyou all so much.
Pete & Jo Ravlich.

Nice and friendly park however was advise the cabin I booked had a full equiped kitchen including oven by phone call before booking then apon arrival their is no kitchen oven, very dissapointed as we had spent alot of money on food we cannot use while here.
Not very true on their behalf.
Dont think i would stay here again after being lied to.
War nur wegen duschen vor Ort. Der sehr nette Eigentümer hat mich zur kostenlosen Dusche geleitet. Wollte auch kein Tip. Sehr nett.
Great location, very clean

we are so happy with the service, we had to cancel our holiday a few weeks prior due to an emergency and the team at this Park were so accomodating with out situation and provided us credit to ensure our family holiday was not missed. Very impressed with how clean and comfortable the park was - perfect for families + the location is perfect

This has become our favourite place to stay on the Gold Coast. Easy access to the beach, a pool for the days the surf doesn't cooperate and close to the food along Tedder Av. The staff here are also fantastic and have helped us out of several jams with no issues.
Lovely caravan park, close to the beach, shops, bus and tram. I love coming here as you don’t need to drive anywhere, everything is within your reach.
Cool to stay at a caravan park in the middle of a city, right across from the beach!
Great place to go for holiday;Great service staff all are very helpful managers doing a great job
Nice quiet park. Clean amd inviting
Love staying at Main Beach Tourist Park! Such a great part of the coast!
Good place to stay right amongst the high rise, walk ,cycle anywhere along the strip.

Stayed for easter school holidays but not on the site we requested next to disability toilet but staff made up for it with great service helping us set up van. Problem with  leaving pool with bad hip as steps far apart and curb and channel high making difficult to back van onto site. Only one side of roads has this issue but the other side is flat. Verdict- great park. Great staff. Great easter activities. Would recommend as close to beach and clean and tidy. Would be happy to stay there anytime

We recently stayed at Main Beach Caravan Park over the Easter weekend and it was hands down the best caravan park experience we’ve had on the Gold Coast.||From the moment we arrived, the park was immaculate. It’s completely smoke-free, incredibly quiet, and maintained to perfection. The facilities are outstanding, with spotless amenities, a great pool, and a well-equipped games room that kept everyone entertained.||The location is absolutely beautiful, making it the perfect base for a relaxing coastal getaway. What truly set this stay apart, though, were the thoughtful touches from the managers. Over Easter, they organised food trucks, coffee vans, live music, and fun Easter activities for the kids, creating such a welcoming and vibrant atmosphere.||You can tell this park is run with care and pride. We couldn’t fault a single thing and will definitely be back.||Highly recommend to anyone looking for a clean, family-friendly caravan park on the Gold Coast. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We recently stayed at Main Beach Caravan Park over the Easter weekend and it was hands down the best caravan park experience we’ve had on the Gold Coast.

From the moment we arrived, the park was immaculate. It’s completely smoke-free, incredibly quiet, and maintained to perfection. The facilities are outstanding, with spotless amenities, a great pool, and a well-equipped games room that kept everyone entertained.

The location is absolutely beautiful, making it the perfect base for a relaxing coastal getaway. What truly set this stay apart, though, were the thoughtful touches from the managers. Over Easter, they organised food trucks, coffee vans, live music, and fun Easter activities for the kids, creating such a welcoming and vibrant atmosphere.

You can tell this park is run with care and pride. We couldn’t fault a single thing and will definitely be back.

Highly recommend to anyone looking for a clean, family-friendly caravan park on the Gold Coast. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Right on the beachfront with easy access.

Short walk to g.line so easy access to gold coast either way

I have never stayed here. I decided not to after seeing vapes are banned from the park. They can ban nicotine vapes but they certainly can't ban a medical vaporiser purchase from a chemist used for prescription medication. I seef you are a medical cannabis patient and this park prohibits you from taking your medication via your medical vaporiser you need to take legal counsel immediately and sue the crap out of the company for discrimination. If you can find other medical patients that have experienced the same issue a class action lawsuit should be taken. Use online forums to find other medical patients that have experienced this kind of discrimination. No company can prohibit a medical patient from taking there medication prescribed by a doctor it is extremely dangerous and illegal and can cause a threat to the health of the patient if they are prohibited from having their medication and medical symptoms occur. Sue these companies using legal aid free lawyers or pay for a lawyer. I was able to sue a hotel and I was able to sue them under both state and federal law. Stand up to discrimination, it should never be tolerated in any form these companies that do it need to be hit very hard with thousands of law suits all over the country.

We recently stayed in a cabin at this caravan park, and unfortunately our experience was quite disappointing.

The cabin itself was not up to standard. The bed was very old and extremely uncomfortable, making it difficult to get a good night’s sleep. The air conditioner in the lounge room didn’t work at all, which left the cabin uncomfortably hot for most of our stay. On top of that, the TV reception was terrible, and since it wasn’t a smart TV, we couldn’t connect any of our own devices. No wifi is also dissapointing.  We actually had to go out just to watch the footy, which was frustrating.

There were also several maintenance and cleanliness issues. The toilet was running continuously, although to be fair, this was eventually fixed. The wardrobe in the main bedroom was in poor condition—the frame had come off at one end, and the shelves inside were dusty. Across all three bedrooms, there were only four coat hangers provided, which is simply not enough.

Basic amenities were also lacking. An iron was supplied, but there was no ironing board. The clothes airer was rusty and unusable—something that would be inexpensive to replace and really should be addressed.

We also didn’t find the reception staff particularly welcoming or helpful, which added to the overall negative experience.

While the park itself is in a great location, based on our stay, I wouldn’t recommend booking a cabin here unless significant improvements are made.

I recently stayed here and was unfortunately not treated very well. The caravan park is not kid friendly, it doesn't allow the use of electric scooters or electric bikes. Management are clearly over the job, would be a good time for them to move on.

I recently stayed here and was unfortunately not treated very well. The caravan park is not kid friendly, it doesn't allow the use of electric scooters or electric bikes. Management are clearly over the job, would be a good time for them to move on.

Parked our caravan here for a couple of weeks and must say a fantastic place to stay with very clean amenities, great pool
, camp kitchen with a lovely little herb garden which you can help yourself too. Staff are super friendly and keep you updated on what’s going on 👍👍

Stayed on a site with ensuite and new fake turf. Nice clean park, new amenities, 2 good kitchens. Pool has some nice tree shade. Some open space to play.
A bit annoying to get any pegs to go in. The under turf treatment must be packed so hard without any moisture - hard to drive pegs, small taps easy to bend them and virtually no hold, just slide out. Other than that all good.
Great caravan park close to all amenities of the Coast. Enjoyable stay.
Gute Lage, super Ausstattung. Alles sehr sauber

Was great to be back after closure.  The gardens around the cabins arent as lush as they used to be. Also.l, was disappointed to see the small playground removed. Other than the pool  there is nothing to "entertain" younger children. (There is a park with playground across the road however)|Despite the USB antenna. The tv glitches and the antenna needed to be extended outside on the patio in order to stop the glitch. bedroom cabin was clean and tidy.|The blinds definitely need replacing throughout the 3 bedroom unit we stayed in, mouldy or dirt which I don't feel is acceptable.

We absolutely loved returning to Main Beach Tourist Park and seeing that all the amazing staff are still here after the long closure! Nicky and Alan, the fantastic managers, along with the rest of the team, continue to deliver service that is truly exceptional and award-worthy. Their warmth, professionalism, and attention to detail make every stay seamless and memorable.||The park itself is spotless, smoke-free, and welcoming, making it a perfect place to relax with family. Being greeted by familiar, friendly faces after such a long time truly made our visit special. Main Beach Tourist Park isn’t just a place to stay, it’s a place that feels like home, thanks to the incredible team!

Very nice park in a great location just across the road from the beach and an easy tram ride to surfers paradise etc. The tram is a 10 minute walk through a lovely area surrounded by cafes and art shops. The amenities are modern and clean and there are lots of them and including a well set up camp kitchen. Nice swimming pool. The sites are lovely soft grass with astroturf surface at the caravan door. Sites are tight in places and the price is up there but imagine the value of this piece of land surrounded by hi rise. I think it is good value for money.

Bus stop just outside the park running every 15 mins into town. Good clean facilities. Our pitch was quite angled so try and get a flat site. Usual sardines for sites. 2 mins walk to the beach ⛱️. Highly recommend.
Amazing location surrounded by skyscrapers a green grassy oasis park for campers.only powered sites though.short walk to shops cafes etc

Fabulous park, great location,
Clean, and another great thing about it was no dogs and no smoking or vapping. 😁

This was our first visit to Main Beach Caravan Park and, after our 10-day stay, we’ve already booked three more trips this year — we absolutely love it here. The location is perfect, with the beach right across the road, and the park itself is exceptionally clean and tidy. We also really appreciate that it is a non-smoking, non-vaping park, which helps the whole place feel fresh and clean.||I’m writing this review a little reluctantly because part of me wants to keep this place a secret! However, the manager and team deserve recognition. They provide outstanding service and genuinely care about their work, which clearly shows in how well the park is run.
Great for the bus stops. The kitchen and showers need a bit more of a clean.
Perfect spot, clean facilities and really friendly staff. Honestly couldn’t ask for more from a holiday park. Loved our stay and would definitely come back.
Great park, amenities were nice and clean, pool was great for little ones with a shallow step area to play on. Nice and close to the beach!

How great is it to be back. The park looks fantastic and the staff have been so welcoming and helpful.|The park is well maintained and tidy.|All the facilities are excellent and now being a non smoking park has made a huge difference to our stay.|We highly recommend staying here and  have already booked our next return holiday.|Keep up the great work Main Beach Team you all do an outstanding job.|Dave & Jo Randall
Great spot, very well kept, easy to get around the Goldie from here. 😊👍

Great location.
Van sites are flat but the need to divert larger vans is necessary.
We had no room to move around site with our smaller van backing onto a larger van.
Staff were great and accommodating.
Love that it is now no smoking or vaping on grounds.  Makes for a cleaner site.

This place is poppin with the new look. Great holiday stay location.

The new synthetic turf looks amazing too ! Totally rad park.
Great place
If you have a tent camping there, don't go. The ground is very bad with lots of small rocks on it. I stayed there and got my tent damaged there. See photo. I hated it.
I stayed here for 4 nights and was great. Really quiet at night. The amenities were clean and in a good condition.
Took the grandies here in our caravan. They had a ball. Warm pool. Right near the beach. A little of a tight fit for the van.
Excellent caravan park, great home away from home

We stayed in main beach in September. We booked an ensuite site which due to our mistake was too small for our van. The park was so accomodating to find us a spot in their booked our park to make sure we could continue our stay. Beautiful location, close to beach park and cafes.
Great site, clean, friendly staff and great location.
Loved it.

Had a great weekend with friends.
It rained all weekend, but still managed to enjoy ourselves. Free membership to the surf club over the road with your booking. Nice meals and friendly people. The park and the amenities were clean.
Walk across the road to the beach and the surf club.
Overall a very pleasant and relaxing experience

We’ve been coming for over 20 years. The location is amazing. The size of the park is perfect. The current staff bend over backwards to help you.

We’ve seen it’s slated to be “re-developed”. Don’t ruin the spacious blocks that carvanners and campers love. And the ensuite access is a must. Please don’t ruin a perfectly functional camp ground!!
Really peaceful spot. I got a powered site. Amenities within close distance. Feels safe. Close to beach. Highly recommend. Shame it’s closing down soon
Not stayed here yet but would like to in near future
I was in a rooftop tent the park was great super clean and staff amazing can not fault the place

Absolutely amazing atmosphere!!! We have stayed here several times and enjoyed it every time. The staff are very helpful and are happy to answer any questions we have, Especially Jo!! She is wonderful. Highly recommend staying here!!

Just stayed for the weekend at the Main Beach Tourist Park on the weekend of the GC500.  I cant say enough about the facilities, the room and the staff.  Everything was above my expectation, and I was so surprised for a local caravan park.

To the end point the personal hygiene pack supplied by Lula was perfectly timed for me.  At the sticky point of the day 11:30pm I needed just this, thank you for seeing this as a value point for your female guests.  It was very much appreciated.

We will be back every chance we get.  Thank you again Nicki and Allan, and staff for everything.

We recently stayed there a few nights in a tent with our infant and toddler. It was a pretty good experience, except for the fairly dirty camp site. There were a lot of cigarette buds, which is especially dangerous travelling with very small children.
The Parents Room however was pretty good. I appreciated the big sink a lot, where I could give my baby a bath easily. The amenities in general were very clean and in good condition.

We really enjoyed our stay here, it’s a great location, stones throw from the beach and in the middle of Sea World and Cavil Ave/Surfers (both 2km away).

The park has a fairly new and modern amenities block, a nice pool for the kids and reasonably quiet considering its proximity to all the appartments and town centre.

They are scheduled to close from February for a long period to do some upgrades to the park, hopefully not too long, but we look forward to seeing how it turns out when they reopen.

Can I say what an amazing Caravan Park experience it was, my husband and I went for the long weekend and was brilliant! Amenities were like new,all the grounds were manicured,and walk across the road to main beach also had the surf club as well!
The staff was very friendly and if I could give them a 10 I would.. Can’t wait to go back again there 🤍

We’ve done a 3/4 lap of Aus and this has to be one of the best parks we’ve stayed in when you add up location, quality of amenities and price!
Walking to beach, good sites, brilliant amenities, pool, games room for kids and lovely staff!! 12/10 🫶🏽
We stayed in the caravan park, what a great location & very reasonably priced compared to other parks on the Gold coast

Absolutely the best caravan park we have stayed in. Amenities are near new. Excellent laundry. All the grounds are manicured. Pool is excellent. Walk across the road to main Beach or a short walk out the back gate to the main shopping street.

Currently staying here with a 5 month old. Went and ask for a refund for one night due to wanting to leave early and was a flat no. Can’t even hear my partner speak over jackhammers that have gone non stop since 9am. To loud that my baby won’t even sleep. We have constantly had bin chicken going through our bin putting rubbish every where. Been on the road for over a month and would far be our worst experience. A bit of warning that it would be this loud would have been nice as we would have simply booked some where more quiet.

I was great your right on the beach side and there's a 7/11 not that far also you and ride these little bike things that you can petal there's even a two seater live music and more and if have kids 100% recommend

What an incredible park. We stayed 8 nights. Amenities are immaculate and new. Location right opposite the beach and perfect bike ride into Surfers paradise or opposite to the Broadbeach parks and playgrounds. Highly recommend and would stay again. Thanks for having us!

Very clean and well maintained park. Amenities very clean and plenty of hot water for showers (best we've seen at a caravan park) Staff friendly and helpful. Safe for kids, very quiet park. Easy walk to Tedder Ave which has really nice cafes and pubs. Across the road from the beach and easy to get to Surfers. Thank you!
First time at this park what a great surprise ex Park so close to every thing keep up the great work 👍
Positioned perfectly

good service .   next to bus stop .
no wifi . pls talk with other like 1993.

Stayed in a cabin and also on a tent site. Cabin was very nice. Roomy, clean and well equipped.
The tent site was a good size for us. Easily fitted the car, double swag, small undercover area an still space left over. Close to surf club which has good dinners, the pavilion which has good breakfast and lunches, Tedder Ave shops and of course the beach.

Nice location in the Centre of the Gold Coast. Excellent access to the foreshore to walk / ride into surfers and down towards sea-world.

Nice grass sites, with new amenities and laundry.

We always enjoy the location, able to ride into town and central location.

Super helpful reception team and plenty of room on the site.

Great spot.
Friendly staff
Great spot, very convenient location!
Great camping location with lots of restaurants close by. The beach and surf club is just across the road.

Great location, wonderful staff ( Alan helped getting into tight site), reception very helpful. Close to Tedder Avenue for restaurants etc. Short walk to patrolled beach and surf club. Nice pool area. Sooooo nice.
Tight parking spots even if you get a drive through it is always tight because it is packed
Stayed aweek couple years ago could quite easy spend a month here in caravan perfectly located lets hope it's not sold out too developers

Zuerst waren wir nicht sicher, ob es schlau war, einen Camping mitten in der Stadt zu besuchen, aber wir waren positiv überrascht. Es war ruhig, sauber und hatte sehr freundliche Leute. Und der Strand mit den riesen Wellen ist der Hammer.
Auch das WC und die Duschen waren 2024 frisch renoviert.
Nur WLAN gibt es nicht 😉
Rooms are quite nice but pricey especially over Xmas. Probably best visiting out of holiday periods.

Good clean facilities and close to the beach
.
We stayed in our van at an en suite site.. ensuite was great with a huge shower. Situated right across from the beach and surf lifesaving club. Top spot and friendly staff.. we will be back.
Best bathrooms ive seen on the east coast to be fair!

Superbe camping. toutes les installations sont très récentes et très bien entrenues. les places de camping sont spacieuses. L'accès à la place direct, aux rues commerçantes également et  très calme. Seul point noir pour moi pas de Wifi gratruit ni payant 😞
Rooms and locations is good. Services need to improve.
Great location for the Gold Coast 500😍
깔끔한 캠핑장
Great place and great amenities. Very clean and tidy.

Cool place in Gold Coast for campervan or mobihome packing with good services like shower, kitchen .etc... the beach is infront so really nice. Rate is a bit higher than others but it's worth since it is in tourist zone.

Main Beach Tourist Park is the perfect location to stay on the Gold Coast.

Great spot close to the beach and a short walk to some fantastic cafes and restaurants. Sea World is also a short walk.

Camp kitchen is great and the ammenities are modern and clean.

Fantastic service and helpful tourist advice from Enya and Vanessa.

Will definitely be staying there again.
Great park for a good price and awesome location
Liked
Liked
Liked
Awesome

Stayed here multiple times and its great. Great location amenities and service. Coffee van is an awesome bonus. Only downside. Is the main bed in our cabin was old and not level. Was pretty uncomfortable. Needed to be replaced.  That is the only downside.  Other than that great value and awesome place to stay
Amenities were very clean and the staff were very friendly and helpful The sites are close together but you would expect that and it wasn't too noisy but might get noise in the school holidays
Quiet location, clean facilities and great location with friendly staff
Very quiet, who knew!
Only to visit a friend. Park well maintained, beach close by. The journey to get there is a bit of a  challenge. Lots of traffic.
Nice big sites,  clean toilets,  good camp kitchen, with fridges and gas cookers. Would go again for sure
Great park for families and an amazing location. Nights were peaceful even though we were there over January holidays.

Excellent location, safe, clean and quiet.
Great staff service.
I highly recommend this place.
We will definitely come back again.
Beautiful

Nous sommes très déçus nous voulions venir dans ce camping . Nous avons appelé à 17h et à 17h30 soit disant l’accueil fermait alors que sur le site c’est écrit 18h… On lui a dit qu’on serait vers 17h40 mais ils ne pouvaient pas attendre 10 minutes .
Bref nous ne pouvons pas dire si nous aimez ce lieu mais déjà nous n’aimons pas cette accueil téléphonique .
Very clean park and near the beach and shops 👌 😎
